title: 9" Emulsion Roller and Tray & Sectional Extension 0.95m Pole Painting DIY Set Home Improvement
features: EXTEND YOUR REACH UP TO 0.95M (3.1FT): This sectional extension pole extends from a compact 0.25m (0.8ft) to a maximum of 0.95m (3.1ft), providing extra reach and leverage for painting high walls, ceilings, and other hard-to-reach areas. VERSATILE DUAL FITTING SYSTEM: Equipped with both a standard screw thread attachment and a convenient push-fit adaptor, ensuring compatibility with a wide variety of roller frames and painting tools.

ROBUST THREADED STEEL CONSTRUCTION: The extension pole is built with sturdy threaded steel sections, offering excellent durability and a secure, wobble-free connection during use. CONVENIENT AND SPACE-SAVING DESIGN: The sectional nature of the pole allows for easy disassembly and compact storage when not in use, saving valuable space in your tool collection.

COMPLETE 9" EMULSION ROLLER KIT INCLUDED: This kit comes with a 9" roller frame and three high-density, medium pile roller refills specifically designed for achieving a good finish with emulsion paints on smooth and semi-smooth surfaces. OPTIMIZED FOR SMOOTH & SEMI-SMOOTH SURFACES: The medium pile of the roller refills ensures optimal paint pick-up and release for even coverage on walls and ceilings with minimal texture.

INCLUDES A PRACTICAL 9" PAINT TRAY: A durable 9" black plastic paint tray is provided, perfectly sized for use with the included 9" roller, making paint application cleaner and more efficient. SPECIFICALLY FOR EMULSION PAINTS: The roller refills are designed to work best with emulsion paints, providing good paint absorption and a consistent application.

IDEAL FOR DIY PROJECTS: This roller kit and extension pole are classified as DIY grade, offering a reliable and cost-effective solution for achieving a basic, good quality finish for your home painting projects. EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO GET STARTED: This comprehensive kit provides the essential tools for painting with emulsion on smooth and semi-smooth surfaces, eliminating the need to purchase individual components.
description: Extend Your Reach & Achieve a Smooth Finish with This 9" Emulsion Roller Kit & Extendable Pole! This convenient kit provides you with everything you need to tackle painting projects on smooth and semi-smooth surfaces. It includes a versatile sectional extension pole for reaching high walls and ceilings with ease, along with a 9" emulsion roller set and a handy paint tray. Key Features: VERSATILE EXTENSION POLE (0.25-0.95m / 0.8-3.1FT): Gain extra reach and leverage for comfortable painting at various heights. Extends from a compact 0.25m (0.8ft) to a maximum of 0.95m (3.1ft). DUAL FITTING COMPATIBILITY: Features both a sturdy threaded attachment and a push-fit adaptor, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of roller frames and applicators. STURDY & DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made with robust threaded steel sections for long-lasting use and secure connections. SPACE-SAVING DESIGN: The sectional design of the extension pole allows for convenient and compact storage when not in use. COMPLETE 9" EMULSION ROLLER KIT: Includes a 9" roller frame and three medium pile, high-density roller refills specifically designed for use with emulsion paints on smooth and semi-smooth surfaces. OPTIMIZED FOR EMULSION PAINTS: The medium pile of the roller refills ensures good paint pick-up and release for a consistent finish with emulsion paints. HANDY 9" BLACK PLASTIC TRAY: A practical and durable black plastic tray is included to hold your emulsion paint, making your painting process cleaner and more efficient. DIY GRADE - GOOD BASIC FINISH: This kit is ideal for DIY enthusiasts looking to achieve a basic, good quality finish on their walls and ceilings with emulsion paints. Kit Contents: 1 x Sectional Extension Pole (0.25m - 0.95m / 0.8ft - 3.1ft) with Screw Thread & Push-Fit Adaptor 1 x 9" Roller Frame 3 x 9" Medium Pile High-Density Roller Refills (for Emulsion Paints) 1 x 9" Black Plastic Paint Tray Perfect for: Painting walls and ceilings with emulsion paints Reaching high or awkward areas DIY home improvement projects Get this convenient and practical kit today and make your painting projects easier and more efficient!
